name: IdentityForce
description_short: Premium identity theft protection with credit monitoring, dark web scanning, and up to $1M insurance. Owned by TransUnion.
description_long:
IdentityForce is a premium identity theft protection service now owned by TransUnion (acquired via Sontiq in 2021). The service provides comprehensive identity monitoring, credit monitoring, and recovery assistance.

UltraSecure plan ($17.99/month) includes identity monitoring, dark web scanning, court records monitoring, social media monitoring, and junk mail opt-out. UltraSecure+Credit ($23.99/month) adds 3-bureau credit monitoring, FICO scores, credit score tracker, and credit report change alerts.

Both plans include $1 million identity theft insurance, a dedicated recovery specialist if your identity is compromised, and smart SSN tracker that monitors how your Social Security number is being used. Being owned by TransUnion gives IdentityForce direct access to credit bureau data.

The service also monitors medical ID theft, tax fraud, and change-of-address fraud — going beyond basic credit monitoring into full identity protection.
pros: Owned by TransUnion — direct bureau data access
Monitors medical, tax, and court records beyond credit
cons: Credit monitoring only on higher-tier plan ($23.99/mo)
best_for: People worried about medical or tax identity fraud
